{{Quote|The Rebellion relies heavily on their Special Forces Soldiers. By eliminating as many of them as possible we will dramatically impact their offensive efforts.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to an Imperial spacer|<ref name="SWG:OTD" />}}
'''Operation Take Down''' was one of the small operations that were led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] against the increasing activity of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]],<ref name="SWG:OTD" /> in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the Rebel Alliance struggled for the control of several cities in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During periods of Imperial occupation of the cities of [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]], [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] or [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], Darth Vader landed in these three capital cities aboard his [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|''ST 321'']]. Accompanied by a group of [[Triumphant-class dark trooper]]s, the Sith Lord attempted to rally support for the Imperial cause and recruit troops for dangerous missions against the Rebellion. Vader recruited a skillful group of the [[Imperial Special Forces/Legends|Imperial Special Forces]] to hunt down the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] of the Rebellion. The spacers subsequently traveled in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and killed ten members of the Alliance Special Forces.<ref name="SWG:OTD" /> The successful Imperial spacers were later assigned to [[Operation Clenched Fist]].<ref name="SWG:OCF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Operation Take Down appeared as a quest in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:OTD" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The quest was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 19 Notes for 29 June 2005|Publish 19]]," on [[June 29]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Update Notes: Publish 19.0 - June 29th, 2005">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=swgpatchnotes&message.id=757|text=Update Notes: Publish 19.0 - June 29th, 2005}}</ref>

During periods of Imperial [[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Planetary control game|occupation]] of the cities of Bestine, Coronet or Theed, Darth Vader would periodically land in these cities. Vader would offer players of the Imperial [[W:c:swg:Faction|faction]] up to eight different [[W:c:swg:Quest|quests]], half of which were designated as "[[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Combatant|Combatant]]" quests (to be carried out against Rebel non-player characters), and the other half of which were designated as "[[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Special Forces|Special Forces]]" quests (to be carried out against Rebel-aligned players). Operation Take Down was the second of the four Imperial Special Forces missions that players received from Darth Vader.<ref name="SWG:OTD" />
